title: Crisp Uruguayan Parmesan Grill
description: A pungent, tender, and energizing Uruguayan dish featuring parmesan, grilled to perfection. Plant-based-friendly option available without parmesan.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F.
Season the lemons with salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Grill the lemons for about 4 minutes per side, or until slightly charred and tender.
Meanwhile, slice the onions and grill them for about 3-4 minutes, or until slightly charred and tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the grilled lemons and onions to the bowl, and toss to combine.
Add the Parmesan cheese, parsley, and cilantro to the bowl, and toss to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter, and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional parsley and cilantro if desired.
Serve with grilled onions and lemons on the side, if desired.
Adjust seasoning to taste with salt and pepper.
